consensus.overall_description: Dusty rose shorts with an asymmetrical black panel and an embroidered rose patch on the front left leg. Features an elastic waistband with a drawstring.
patches: Embroidered rose bouquet patch with red roses and green/white base on lower right leg
consensus.stitching_details: standard seam construction visible at side seams

claude: contrast color block panel across upper thighs
horizontal dark green/black color block panel across both legs at mid-thigh level
gemini: diagonal black color-blocked panel across the midsection

values.gemini: nylon or similar synthetic woven material

values.gpt: Dusty rose shorts with an asymmetrical black panel and an embroidered rose patch on the front left leg. Features an elastic waistband with a drawstring.
values.claude: Salmon pink lightweight nylon athletic shorts featuring a dark green horizontal panel across the upper legs and an embroidered red rose bouquet patch on the lower right leg, finished with a black drawstring waistband.
values.gemini: A pair of light pink athletic-style shorts with a wide, diagonal black panel across the middle. They feature an elastic waistband with black drawstrings and an embroidered rose patch on the lower left leg.

claude: Embroidered rose bouquet patch with red roses and green/white base on lower right leg
